project_privacy_data_flows.description: User exports notes as PDF, Markdown, HTML, or Plain Text. Single note, multi-select, or all notes exported. Full export requires account password verification.

flow_steps.details: User taps 'Export all notes' in Settings > Backup and Restore.

flow_steps.code: const formats = ['md', 'html', 'txt', 'pdf']; const selected = await prompt(format);
flow_steps.details: User selects export format: PDF, Markdown, HTML, or Plain Text.
Account password required for exporting all notes. Authentication verified against server.
All notes exported into selected format. Tags and internal links resolved. Attachments included.
Exported file saved to Notesnook/exported folder on device local storage.
